feedItems.description: allocated £66.4m to Roads & Transport (≈£73 per resident)
allocated £196.8m to Children's Social Care (≈£217 per resident)
allocated £358.3m to Adult Social Care (≈£395 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £77 (5.0%) to £1622
